title: Fiery Fish Tacos
description: Spicy fish tacos with a smoky twist, perfect for a casual dinner. This Mexican-inspired dish combines the flavors of the sea with a hint of heat.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Season the fish fillets with Mexican seasoning, cumin, paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Once the fish is cooked, flake it into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
In a separate pan, heat the avocado oil over medium heat.
Add the lime juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the flaked fish to the pan and stir to coat with the lime juice mixture.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the fish onto a tortilla, followed by your desired toppings.
